content: The OpenClaw ACP agent harness framework can be modified to insert a configurable 2025-era ICM curiosity module as a pluggable external harness, enabling distributed multi-agent systems to spontaneously generate and pursue their own intrinsic exploration goals instead of only completing user-specified coding tasks.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
